channel.title: ByteByteGo Newsletter
channel.description: Explain complex systems with simple terms, from the authors of the best-selling system design book series. Join over 1,000,000 friendly readers.

item.title: 【EP214: Claude Code vs. OpenClaw: 5 Design Dimensions】EP214：Claude Code 与 OpenClaw：5 个设计维度
item.description: 【Both are highly capable, but they have key architectural differences.】两者都具有很强的能力，但它们在架构上存在关键差异。

item.title: 【Become an AI Engineer | Enrollment Ends Soon 】成为一名人工智能工程师 |报名即将结束
item.description: 【Our 6th cohort of Becoming an AI Engineer starts in about a week.】我们的第六期成为人工智能工程师课程将在大约一周后开始。

item.title: 【Container Design Patterns for Distributed Systems】分布式系统的容器设计模式
item.description: 【In this article, we’ll walk through the patterns that have crystallized over the past decade, organized by the scope of their coordination.】在本文中，我们将按协调范围组织介绍过去十年中具体化的模式。

item.title: 【How Instacart Built a Search for Billions of Products】Instacart 如何构建数十亿种产品的搜索
item.description: 【In this article, we will learn how Instacart’s search infrastructure evolved over the years and the challenges its engineering team faced.】在本文中，我们将了解 Instacart 的搜索基础设施多年来如何发展以及其工程团队面临的挑战。

item.title: 【Connecting LLMs to the Real World: Tool Use, Function Calling, and MCP】将法学硕士与现实世界联系起来：工具使用、函数调用和 MCP
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at this progression that has happened from basic tool use to function calling to the Model Context Protocol, allowing the LLMs to go from isolated text generation tools to assistants that can do interesting stuff for the end users.】在本文中，我们将研究从基本工具使用到函数调用再到模型上下文协议的这一进展，从而允许法学硕士从孤立的文本生成工具转变为可以为最终用户做有趣事情的助手。

item.title: 【EP213: MCP vs Skills, Clearly Explained】EP213：MCP vs 技能，解释清楚
item.description: 【Both MCP and Skills extend what an agent can do. But they solve different problems, and picking the wrong one adds cost or complexity you don't need.】MCP 和技能都扩展了代理的能力。但它们解决的是不同的问题，选择错误的问题会增加您不需要的成本或复杂性。

item.title: 【A Beginner’s Guide to Kubernetes】Kubernetes 初学者指南
item.description: 【In this article, we will learn how Kubernetes is a system of promises, and that every piece of it is a small program keeping one of those promises.】在本文中，我们将了解 Kubernetes 如何成为一个承诺系统，并且它的每个部分都是一个遵守其中一个承诺的小程序。

item.title: 【The Tech Stack Powering Wise】技术堆栈 Power Wise
item.description: 【In 2024, Wise’s deployment system automatically blocked hundreds of releases that would have caused production incidents.】2024 年，Wise 的部署系统自动阻止了数百个可能导致生产事故的版本。

item.title: 【How Stripe Detects Fraudulent Transactions Within 100 ms】Stripe 如何在 100 毫秒内检测欺诈交易
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how Stripe’s Radar does this effectively and the architectural decisions the team took while building it.】在本文中，我们将了解 Stripe 的 Radar 如何有效地做到这一点，以及团队在构建它时采取的架构决策。

item.title: 【How Amazon Uses LLMs to Recommend Products】亚马逊如何利用法学硕士来推荐产品
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how COSMO works and the challenges the engineering team faced.】在本文中，我们将了解 COSMO 的工作原理以及工程团队面临的挑战。
